paper_title: ALBERT: A Lite BERT for Self-supervised Learning of Language Representations

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **factorized embedding parameterization** (decomposes vocabulary embeddings into smaller matrices) and **cross-layer parameter sharing**, reducing parameters by ~18x compared to BERT-base while maintaining performance.
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, question answering, text classification, reading comprehension
raw_extraction.research_problem: Parameter-efficient pretraining of language representations with reduced memory/compute overhead while preserving performance.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM), Sentence Order Prediction (SOP)
raw_extraction.extension: Cross-layer parameter sharing stabilizes training and reduces parameter growth with depth.
raw_extraction.paper_title: ALBERT: A Lite BERT for Self-supervised Learning of Language Representations

raw_extraction.innovation: Factorized embeddings and cross-layer parameter sharing enable a 18M-parameter model (vs. BERT-large’s 334M) with comparable performance, improving training speed by 1.7x.
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, reading comprehension (RACE), GLUE benchmark tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable pretraining with reduced computational cost while achieving state-of-the-art performance.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM), Sentence Order Prediction (SOP)
raw_extraction.extension: Sentence Order Prediction (SOP) replaces Next Sentence Prediction (NSP) to focus on inter-sentence coherence.
raw_extraction.paper_title: ALBERT: A Lite BERT for Self-supervised Learning of Language Representations

raw_extraction.innovation: Combines factorized embeddings and cross-layer sharing to achieve 60M parameters with a hidden size of 2048, outperforming BERT-large (334M) on GLUE/RACE benchmarks.
raw_extraction.application: Reading comprehension (RACE), GLUE benchmark tasks, multi-sentence reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balancing model capacity and parameter efficiency for large-scale pretraining.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM), Sentence Order Prediction (SOP)
raw_extraction.extension: Cross-layer parameter sharing enables deeper architectures without proportional parameter growth.
raw_extraction.paper_title: ALBERT: A Lite BERT for Self-supervised Learning of Language Representations

raw_extraction.innovation: Achieves 235M parameters with a hidden size of 4096, demonstrating ALBERT’s ability to scale efficiently while retaining superior performance over BERT-large.
raw_extraction.application: Advanced natural language understanding, long-range dependency modeling
raw_extraction.research_problem: Optimizing parameter efficiency for very large hidden dimensions.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM), Sentence Order Prediction (SOP)
raw_extraction.extension: Sentence Order Prediction (SOP) enhances coherence modeling for multi-sentence tasks.
raw_extraction.paper_title: ALBERT: A Lite BERT for Self-supervised Learning of Language Representations
